title: DEEMEI Artificial Babys Breath Flowers, Artificial Gypsophila White Fake Flowers Bouquets Real Touch for Arrangements Wedding Home Decor Table Party DIY Wreath 6Pcs, White
features: 💐 QUANTITY & SIZE: Each pack includes 6 stems of artificial flowers, standing 20.5" (52 cm) tall with 3 forks per stem and around 90 small flower heads. Perfect for most vase sizes and wedding table decorations.
🌷 REALISTIC MATERIALS: Made from soft PU, these gypsophila artificial flowers look and feel like real blooms. The flexible, sturdy wire stems are wrapped in plastic for easy arranging.
💐 DURABLE & HASSLE-FREE: These fake flowers are UV-resistant, non-toxic, and require no maintenance. They’re reusable and ideal for artificial flowers for decoration in any space.
✨ VERSATILE USES: Perfect for wedding table decorations, home décor, or DIY projects. Use them as centrepieces or fillers to add a touch of charm.
👰 DISPLAY TIP: Fluff the stems after unpacking for a natural look. For fuller displays, consider purchasing 3 or more packs of these baby’s breath flowers artificial.
description: Product Description Beautiful space, Beautiful mood! DEEMEI artificial flowers interpret romantic space art, you create your own art space. What can you get？ - Packaging: 6 pcs babys breath Colors to choose from - White、Blue、Pink Suitable for various occasions: These lifelike artificial babys breath flowers can also be used to decorate your bedroom, living room and kitchen. Suggested quantity ： If you want full bouquet as same effects as in the picture, please purchase 3 pack or more. Ideal choice for creating dreamy weddings decorations Babys breath is a symbol of everlasting love, pureness, and innocence . Perfect for your wedding day.Artificial flowers won't fade or wither, which symbolizes eternal love. The babys breath flower was exactly what you're hoping for, looks real and beautiful in any centerpieces, the realistic flowers gave them the perfect boost. Babys Breath Flower DIY A Filler Flower That Became the New Main Attraction. White babys breath flowers Pink babys breath flowers Blue babys breath flowers Babys breath flower is made of PU plastic and bendable/foldable in creating the stems.
